# Mia-Care P4SaMD

Mia-Care P4SaMD is an AI-native platform for Software as a Medical Device (SaMD) compliance.
It embeds regulatory compliance directly into software development workflows, eliminating
the bottleneck between engineering velocity and regulatory requirements.

## What P4SaMD does

P4SaMD orchestrates the entire SDLC with compliance enforced at every stage. It connects
existing tools (Git, ALM, eQMS) into a fully IEC 62304-compliant workflow, automates
traceability, generates audit-ready documentation, and provides real-time regulatory guidance.

## Regulatory frameworks covered

EU MDR 2017/745, IVDR 2017/746, FDA, ISO 13485, ISO 14971, 21 CFR Part 820,
IEC 62304, IEC 82304-1, IEC 62366-1, IEC 81001-5-1, EU AI Act, GMLP, PCCP, GDPR, HIPAA.

## Eight capabilities

1. SDLC Workflow Orchestrator — orchestrates compliant development workflows
2. Automated Real-time Traceability (ARTT) — end-to-end traceability automatically maintained
3. Documentation Engine — automatic DHF and Technical File generation
4. Smart Assistant (Whisper) — in-workflow regulatory guidance
5. Master AI for Compliance — EU AI Act and GMLP enforcement for AI-enabled SaMD
6. Brownfield Remediator — legacy software certification without rebuilding
7. Secure Software Development — IEC 81001-5-1 security compliance
8. Guided Workflows — step-by-step compliance guidance for every developer

## Use cases

- SaMD Greenfield Development
- Building High-Risk AI Software (CDSS)
- Legacy Regulated Software Remediation

## Company

Mia-Care S.r.l. — https://www.mia-care.io
